description: Experimental lab for procedural horror algorithms, process-deity models, and high-risk research contracts.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: Research artifacts may contain intense content but must be gated from public exposure.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All research artifacts must use dedicated research schemas, separate from production contracts.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: Experiments must declare which production contract families they shadow or extend.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: Only explicitly registered research objectKinds should route here from the spine.

authoringHints.summary: Use this lab for experimental contract forms and process-god models that may never ship to production.
aiBehavior: Do not generate production moodContract, eventContract, seedContractCard, or regionContractCard here.
Use this repo for experiments that extend or test new invariants and metrics configurations.
Assume higher tolerance for unsatisfied constraints, but keep everything behind Dead-Ledger and internal reviews.
